content:
<!-- type: changes lang: yaml -->
files:
  # Lexer
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/lexer/mod.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Add string prefix recognition (r, b, rb/br), escape sequence processing, \N{name} lookup

  # Parser
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/parser/ast.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Add Starred expr variant, extend Slice with step field, add bytes literal node
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/parser/expr.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Parse star expressions in assignment targets and function call args
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/parser/stmt.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Parse global/nonlocal statements, decorator any-expression (PEP 614)
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/parser/stmt_compound.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Full PEP 614 decorator expression parsing

  # Name Resolution
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/resolve/pass.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Handle global/nonlocal declarations in scope classification
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/resolve/scope.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Add Global/Nonlocal variable kinds to scope chain

  # HIR / Lowering
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/hir/mod.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Add HIR nodes for star unpacking, 3-arg slice, global/nonlocal
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/lower/ast_to_hir.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Desugar decorators, star unpacking, global/nonlocal, bytes literals
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/lower/hir_to_mir.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Lower star unpacking to unpack_star calls, 3-arg slices, scope modifiers

  # MIR
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/mir/mod.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Add MIR instructions for unpack_star, slice_step, global/nonlocal load/store

  # Codegen
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/codegen/cranelift/jit.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: JIT emit for new MIR instructions (unpack, slice step, scope modifiers, bytes)
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/codegen/cranelift/mod.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Symbol wiring for new runtime helpers

  # Runtime
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/builtins.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Add unpack_star, slice_step dispatch, bytes() constructor
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/list_ops.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: List slice with step implementation
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/tuple_ops.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Tuple slice with step implementation
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/string_ops.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: String slice with step on Unicode codepoints
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/bytes_ops.rs
    action: CREATE
    desc: Full bytes type operations (find, replace, decode, startswith, split, join, hex, etc.)
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/rc.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Add ObjKind::Bytes and ObjData::Bytes(Vec<u8>)
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/closure.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Mutable capture upgrade for nonlocal variables
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/runtime/symbols.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Register new runtime symbols (mb_unpack_star, mb_slice_step, mb_bytes_*)

  # Type Checker
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/types/check_stmt.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Handle global/nonlocal in type inference, decorator special cases
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/src/types/check_expr.rs
    action: MODIFY
    desc: Star expression type inference, bytes literal type

  # Tests
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/tests/fixtures/conformance/decorator_full.py
    action: CREATE
    desc: Conformance tests for PEP 614 decorators
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/tests/fixtures/conformance/star_unpacking.py
    action: CREATE
    desc: Conformance tests for extended unpacking
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/tests/fixtures/conformance/scope_modifiers.py
    action: CREATE
    desc: Conformance tests for global/nonlocal
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/tests/fixtures/conformance/slice_step.py
    action: CREATE
    desc: Conformance tests for 3-arg slice
  - path: crates/cclab-mamba/tests/fixtures/conformance/string_escapes.py
    action: CREATE
    desc: Conformance tests for escape sequences, raw strings, bytes
